title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The momentous occasion is finally upon us! The
Tokyo Yushun, the Japanese Derby, the race of
all races!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, the Umamusume most blessed by the
heavens shall be revealed! What joy! What bliss!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But, do I really have to run? I'm already taking on
the role of oracle, so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm kidding, really! I'm all fired up, you know!
Plus, I need to keep my promise to Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My sister was great, but Suzuka is like, ten times
more capable than even her. She's like ten sisters
rolled into one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But that's not going to stop me from beating her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Is what I wish I was cool enough to say. But I'll
put on a brave face and give it my all, at least.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I usually get by on luck, so I should be able to put
on a good race for you, Trainer.
choice_data_list: All right! Show everyone what you can do!
All right! Show everyone what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! My warding spells are all set to protect me
from this monster of a race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I am a blessed Horsegirl, a veritable picture of good
health! I vow to carry myself to the finish line and
accomplish my goals!
